settings.title: We Are Launching Small Group Strength Classes
settings.excerpt: Capped at four people per session, these classes give you coaching attention without the one to one price.
settings.body:
Plenty of people want real coaching but find one to one training out of reach. Starting this month, Ironform is running small group strength sessions capped at four people.

Each block runs for eight weeks and follows a proper progression, not a random workout of the day. You learn the main lifts, build them week over week, and we keep an eye on every rep.

Why we capped it at four

The number is not arbitrary. With four people we can still watch each lift, give a quick cue, and step in before a small fault becomes a habit. Push the group much larger and the coaching thins out until it is just supervision. We would rather keep it tight.

Because the groups are tiny, you still get hands on correction. The cost per session is roughly half of private training, which is the whole point of running them this way.

What a typical block covers

Over the eight weeks you will spend most of your time on a handful of movements rather than a long list. Expect to work on:

  • A squat pattern, building toward your own comfortable depth.
  • A hinge, usually a deadlift variation scaled to where you are.
  • A press, both overhead and from the floor.

You do not need any experience to join. We will scale every lift to your starting point, and nobody is expected to keep up with anybody else. The plan follows you, not the other way round.

The first block starts the second week of February. Message us to claim one of the spots.
